title: Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro Generally Available
description: Google made Gemini 2.5 Flash and Gemini 2.5 Pro generally available and introduced Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite in preview. The release framed Gemini 2.5 as a hybrid reasoning family balancing performance, speed, and cost for production use.
highlights: Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro reached GA
Hybrid reasoning family for production use
Balance of quality, speed, and cost

sources.title: We’re expanding our Gemini 2.5 family of models
